messages.text: Hi Abdi, just flagged something from Sunday at Kallan's — you didn't clock in for either of your shifts that day (the 15:00–21:00 and the 21:00–09:00). Can you let me know what happened? We need to get this sorted.

Hey Ali — just following up on a few things from last week. So the system auto-closed your shifts at Kallan's on the 17th and 18th — were you clocking out manually before you left, or did that slip? Just want to make sure we've got your hours right.

Also, that incident report from Wednesday needs a bit more detail for NDIS — right now it just says "Behavioural" but they need to actually understand what happened. Can you add some notes on that and who you notified after (family, guardian, etc)? Should ideally be within 30 mins of the shift ending but let me know when you can get to it.

One more thing — you've clocked 17.3 hours this period but were only rostered for 12. Just double-check with your manager about getting that extra 5.3 hours authorised so we can bill it properly.

Oh and your shift amendments for Wed, Thu, Fri have come through fine — just sitting in the queue for approval, no action needed from you.

Can you get back to me on the clock-outs and that incident report when you get a sec?

Hey — just flagging a couple things from Thursday at Kallan's. You clocked in at 18:37 but were meant to start at 15:00 — what happened there? Nearly 3.5 hours late.

Also, the system auto-closed your shift at 21:10 since you didn't clock out manually. Just make sure you're clocking out yourself when you finish, yeah?

One more — we've got your shift amendment in and it's pending review on our end. Nothing you need to do, we'll sort it and get back to you.

So just following up on something — I'm seeing you clocked 6.4 hours across your shifts this period but you were only rostered for 5 hours. Are those extra hours all approved? Need to make sure before we bill anything out.

Also got your shift amendment notes from Nada Haliem's on the 22nd — they're in the system and pending review on our end. Nothing else you need to do there 👍

Hey Mohamed — just need to clarify a couple things from Saturday at Kallan's. You were rostered 15:00–21:00 but we've got no record of you clocking in at all. Did that shift end up happening? Also the system shows it auto-closed at 15:10, so if you did work it just make sure you're manually clocking out from now on. And heads up — we've got your shift amendment pending review, notes came through fine. Can you get back to me today on the clock-in thing?

Actually quick question — Evan clocked out at 11:16 on Saturday the 20th but was scheduled til 2. Do you know what happened there? That's a pretty early finish.

Also got Joshua down as clocking in at 10:25 on Monday the 22nd with no shift on the roster for that time — did he work that one? And separately, his amendment notes came through and are being reviewed, so he's all set on that front.

Can you get back to me on those today?

Hey, just noticed a few things we need to sort out quick.

Did you work the shift at Kallan's on Sunday (21 June, 09:00–15:00)? You never clocked in for that one.

Also missing clock-ins for Wednesday at Kallan's (15:00–21:00) and Thursday morning at Joshua's (09:00–14:00) — need you clocking in for every shift you work so we've got the record.

And that incident report you filed for Kallan's on Wednesday — it just says "Training cancelled" but NDIS needs more detail about what actually happened. Also need to know who you notified about it (guardian, family member, whoever). Can you fill those in today?

So just following up — the incident reports from Thursday and Friday at Evan's still need proper notes in them. NDIS needs actual details about what happened, who was there, all that. Remember those are meant to go in within 30 mins of the shift ending so we can process them properly. Can you add those in when you get a chance?

Also got a couple things that came up from your recent shifts — you clocked in 79 mins late on Sunday at Evan's (scheduled 9am, showed up at 10:18). What happened there?

And just checking on your hours across this period — you've got 6.9 hours clocked but only 5 hours rostered, so there's an extra 1.9 hours there. Are all those extra hours meant to be billed?

Let me know when you've sorted the incident reports and we can chat through the rest 👍

Just caught a couple of things from your recent shifts — can we sort them out?

First up, on Saturday the 20th, the system auto-clocked you out at 15:10, but there's no manual clock-out on file. Did you forget to clock out that day, or did something happen?

Also flagging that this period you've clocked 10 hours but were only rostered for 5 — that's a 5-hour difference. Can you double-check that all those extra hours got approved? Just need to verify before we bill.

And FYI, we've got your amendment request for the 20th — notes came through fine, just sitting in the queue for our review. You're all set on your end.

Can you get back to me when you've got a sec today?

Hi Ikram,

Just flagging something from your roster — Xavier Putchakayla on Thursday 18th June (17:00–21:00 shift) never clocked in. Can you let me know what happened there?

Hi Ahmed,

Just flagging a couple of things from your shift at Joshua Gatt's on Saturday:

The system auto clock-out kicked in at 14:10 since you didn't manually clock out — just so you know for next time, make sure to do that before you leave.

Also got your shift amendment request and we've got your notes. They're pending review on our end, so nothing you need to do — we'll sort it and let you know.
